title: Assist with routine maintenance of machinery and equipment
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Assist with routine maintenance of machinery and equipment demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for basic routine maintenance

pcs.text: Read or listen to work instructions from supervisor and clarify where necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Read or listen to work instructions from supervisor and clarify where necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Read or listen to work instructions from supervisor and clarify where necessary.

pcs.text: Select tools and supplies required to carry out basic routine maintenance tasks according to job requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select tools and supplies required to carry out basic routine maintenance tasks according to job requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select tools and supplies required to carry out basic routine maintenance tasks according to job requirements.

pcs.text: Select, fit and use personal protective equipment applicable to job requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit and use personal protective equipment applicable to job requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit and use personal protective equipment applicable to job requirements.

pcs.text: Carry out routine pre-operational checks of machinery and equipment according to operation and maintenance manual and make adjustments where required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out routine pre-operational checks of machinery and equipment according to operation and maintenance manual and make adjustments where required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out routine pre-operational checks of machinery and equipment according to operation and maintenance manual and make adjustments where required.

pcs.text: Identify and segregate faulty or unsafe machinery and equipment for repair or replacement
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and segregate faulty or unsafe machinery and equipment for repair or replacement?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and segregate faulty or unsafe machinery and equipment for repair or replacement.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards in the workplace and report safety concerns to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards in the workplace and report safety concerns to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards in the workplace and report safety concerns to supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for basic routine maintenance

elements.title: Carry out basic routine maintenance

pcs.text: Carry out greasing, lubrication and other basic servicing of machinery and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out greasing, lubrication and other basic servicing of machinery and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out greasing, lubrication and other basic servicing of machinery and equipment.

pcs.text: Make routine adjustments and repairs to machinery and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Make routine adjustments and repairs to machinery and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Make routine adjustments and repairs to machinery and equipment.

pcs.text: Use safe workplace practices and methods when undertaking basic routine maintenance tasks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use safe workplace practices and methods when undertaking basic routine maintenance tasks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use safe workplace practices and methods when undertaking basic routine maintenance tasks.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out basic routine maintenance

elements.title: Complete basic routine maintenance activities

pcs.text: Clean and store tools according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and store tools according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and store tools according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Clean and maintain work areas and return to operating condition
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and maintain work areas and return to operating condition?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and maintain work areas and return to operating condition.

pcs.text: Collect, treat and dispose or recycle waste from maintenance activities according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect, treat and dispose or recycle waste from maintenance activities according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect, treat and dispose or recycle waste from maintenance activities according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Report malfunctions, faults, wear or damage of tools to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report malfunctions, faults, wear or damage of tools to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report malfunctions, faults, wear or damage of tools to supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete basic routine maintenance activities

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
